summary: Tested Kent 11+ Schools Hub features: 1) Academic performance data (Ofsted, Attainment 8, Grade 5+ English & Maths) in school comparison and detail pages, 2) Local PDF serving for 130 practice papers via /api/papers endpoint. All 18 backend tests passed, all frontend flows working correctly.

design_issues.issue: React warning: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop in comparison table section headers

action_items: Optional: Fix React key warning in ComparePage comparison table (line ~964 in App.js where section rows are rendered)
seed_data_creation: Schools auto-seeded on startup (32 Kent grammar schools with academic performance data)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Comprehensive test suite created at /app/backend/tests/test_kent_schools.py covering: schools CRUD with academic data, papers API for PDF serving, comparison endpoint, stats endpoint. All 130 PDFs verified downloadable from /api/papers/{filename}.

academic_performance_data.details: All schools have Ofsted, Attainment 8, Grade 5+ English & Maths data. Displayed in school detail sidebar and comparison table.

local_pdf_serving.details: 130 PDFs stored at /app/backend/static/papers/, served via /api/papers/{filename}. Practice Papers page uses getLocalPaperUrl() helper to convert external URLs to local API endpoints.

school_comparison.details: Comparison table includes ACADEMIC PERFORMANCE section with Ofsted Rating, Attainment 8 Score, Grade 5+ English & Maths, EBacc Entry Rate, Post-16 Destination

independent_schools_page.details: 100 paper links all pointing to local /api/papers/ endpoint
